summary: Iteration 23 - Sijill Project Website v4 Frontend Testing. All v4 features verified successfully: Logo 'SIJILL PROJECT.' with green dot, About page updated with 'Sijill Project' (NOT 'Le Sijill'), Resources tab with 4 sections (Frise chronologique, Contexte historique, Bibliographie, Conférences Audio), ResourceViewer with formatted content and badges, Homepage cursus section with '5 CURSUS DISPONIBLES' and 'Les grandes voies du savoir islamique'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: React website v4 at /api/site/ fully tested. All v4 updates working correctly.

logo_v4.details: Logo shows 'SIJILL PROJECT.' with green dot (.logo-dot). HTML structure: Sijill Project.

about_page_v4.details: About page updated - contains 'Sijill Project' throughout (NOT 'Le Sijill'). All sections present: 'Pourquoi Sijill Project?', 'Qui sommes-nous?', 'quatre principes', 'héritage intellectuel'

homepage_cursus_section.details: Shows '5 CURSUS DISPONIBLES' (in green accent) and 'Les grandes voies du savoir islamique' as section title. 5 cursus cards displayed (A-E)

resources_tab_4_sections.details: Resources tab shows 4 sections exactly as specified: 'FRISE CHRONOLOGIQUE', 'CONTEXTE HISTORIQUE', 'BIBLIOGRAPHIE', 'CONFÉRENCES AUDIO'

frise_chronologique_card.details: Timeline card shows 'La Falsafa — Philosophie islamique' with subtitle 'Timeline interactive · Plein écran'

context_card_navigation.details: Clicking context card navigates to /ressource/fiche/{id}. ResourceViewer shows 'FICHE CONTEXTUELLE' badge, proper title 'Le Mouvement de Traduction — VIIIe-Xe siècle', formatted content with headings

biblio_card_navigation.details: Clicking biblio card navigates to /ressource/biblio/{id}. ResourceViewer shows 'BIBLIOGRAPHIE' badge, title 'Bibliographie - Module 1', formatted bibliography content with references

resource_viewer_formatting.details: ResourceViewer renders markdown with proper typography: h2/h3/h4 headings, paragraphs, proper styling via .resource-body CSS class
